channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Children Safety Concern, no pavement to bus, 9th April
item.description:
Wr alteady live at new Harper Crew development, there is currently no pavement leading to the bus stop (unmarked) and no safe walking route. Children are forced to walk on or very close to the road on the grass and mud, which creates a significant safety risk, especially during busy traffic hours. After school children jump on the grass, no safety crossing the road... speed sign change from 40 to 30 just before the bent and not many cars slow down at this point, and from other side start to speed up... The road is busy, and without a pavement or temporary walking path, this situation is dangerous and unacceptable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 9th April
item.description:
The roads here are super bumpy and are in incredibly bad condition - Damaged tires
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 9th April
item.description:
Cw kerbing X1 1/2 stone needs resetting Stats required Give and take (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 9th April
item.description:
Cw pothole 600x402x42mm Give and take (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 9th April
item.description:
Pothole CW 400x400x60mm 3 way stop and go Stats (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In the road on approach to Willow Farm, 9th April
item.description:
Several large potholes near this location. Vehicles have to swerve around them to avoid damage to vehicles tyres/wheels. Men from highways have marked some potholes with white paint further down into the village but did not inspect the road near to Willow Farm
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 9th April
item.description:
Damaged KL Bollard CW ENWD Stop and go TM MAKE SAFE WITH TEMPORARY KL SIGN Enquiry raised for Street Lighting (Damaged Bollard)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW10 problem, 9th April
item.description:
Depression CW 1650mm x 900mm x 43mm Stop and go TM Stats Required Service Trench (CW10 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised problem, 9th April
item.description:
Damaged Illuminated KL Bollard. Asset Number 113300. Please pass on to Street Lighting to arrange reinstatement. Making safe with temporary sign.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 9th April
item.description:
Loose and rocking slab Please take up and relay 600x600mm Standard TM with temp fw closure Stats (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 9th April
item.description:
Loose and rocking slab Please take up and relay 600x600mm Standard TM with temp fw closure Stats (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 9th April
item.description:
Pothole CW 600x400x50mm 2 way stop and go No parking cones required before starting work Stats X 1 NSD (CW6 Pothole)

item.description:
Pothole CW 500x400x50mm 2 way stop and go No parking cones required before starting work X 1 NSD (CW6 Pothole)

item.description:
Pothole CW 500x500x50mm 2 way stop and go No parking cones required before starting work (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 9th April
item.description:
Depression CW 1000x1000x40mm 2 way stop and go No parking cones before work starts (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree STILL no rectified, 9th April
item.description:
Despite numerous reports both to the county council and Cheltenham Borough Council (who said they would pass the report on but obviously haven’t) this tree is still an issue. I will have no problem requesting compensation if and when the dead limb breaks and causes damage to property or person. The tree has now been an issue for at least 18 months and been reported by myself and others and despite being informed that work is scheduled, nothing has been done.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Eldon Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 16 Salamanca Road, 9th April
item.description:
I have reported this road before on 5th December 2025 and that was not the first time it just goes on getting worse every day, you have done nothing at all to alleviate the problems, The entire Salamanca Road up to no 30 is a complete hazard of ever growing potholes, stones and debris all over the place the corner is full of potholes getting bigger by the day and very difficult to avoid because of parked cars when driving up there, there will be some serious damage to cars if this is allowed to continue without repair, please somebody come along and do something about it, I know the whole of Cheltenham is a mess of potholes but I feel this needs your attention sooner than later please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Salamanca Road, Oakley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on Bethesda St, 8th April
item.description:
This was marked as fixed a few months ago but now it is back.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bath Terrace, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of potholes, 8th April
item.description:
They've been here for months and the road is only getting worse. It's impossible to avoid them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple deep potholes along the whole stretch of road, 8th April
item.description:
Multiple deep pots holes starting just before the turning of blaisdon way all the way down to the turning of pilgrims way the whole road needs resurfacing as pot holes keep reappearing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
